dict.string: This app requires access to your camera to take photos for uploading personal profile avatars or posting image content. All captured photos are saved locally on your device securely and will only be uploaded or shared after you grant explicit approval.

This app requires access to your location information to deliver customized user experiences. Your location data will be kept strictly confidential and only utilized to optimize app functionality with your active authorization.
This app uses your current location to show the city you are in while you are using the app.

This app requires access to your microphone to capture audio for voice chat functions. Audio recordings will only be collected and utilized with your clear explicit consent, and no audio content will be accessed without your authorization.

This app requires access to your photo album to select saved images for uploading personal profile avatars or posting image content. Selected image files will solely be applied to your authorized purposes and stored safely on your device.
